title: Writing Tests with Mocha Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Mocha test case structure.

questions.question: Regarding the code structure of a Mocha test suite, what does the 'describe' block do?
options: It groups related test cases together

questions.question: In Mocha, which of these is used to define a specific, individual test case?
Which of these is the correct command for running your project's Mocha tests from the CLI?
options: Both npm test and running the mocha CLI directly are valid
